channel.title: W. Va. on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in W. Va. on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) TFM: Cabell County Sheriff’s Office (W. Va.)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Cabell County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: TFM Signed: September 22, 2025 County: Cabell County State: W. Va. FIPS: unresolved

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.
